Quick Actions

Hotels & Properties

Room Management

Configure room configurations, pricing per night, availability status, and inventory limits.

Room Type Hotel Property Room # Price Capacity Beds Inventory Status Action

Platform Bookings

Review reservations, manage check-in workflows, process cancellations, and handle refunds.

Booking ID Guest Details Hotel & Room Check-in / Out Total Price Booking Status Payment Action

Registered Users

Review database customers, inspect booking history, and manage profile status.

User ID Name Email Address Phone Registered On Role Account Status Action

Review Moderation

Moderate customer reviews, delete spam ratings, and post official manager replies.

Offers & Coupons

Configure marketing discount codes, expiry guidelines, and usage thresholds.

Payments & Transactions

Audit invoice transactions, configure payment gateway settings, and handle manual refund requests.

AI Support Chat

Hello! I am your AI Booking assistant. I analyze occupancy and pricing. Type your question below!

Automated Insights

Price Alert Munnar: Weekend occupancy is projected to reach 92%. Recommend raising rates by 12%.
High Demand Beachfront: The Riverside Retreat has received 3 cancellations. Re-listing immediately.
